summary:
The fix has been verified. The test script now passes, showing:

1. The file integrity check passed (no data corruption)
2. No overlapping segment assignments were detected
3. All concurrent write runs produced correct output

The issue was in the `segments_for_worker` function in `src/config.rs`, which was intentionally creating overlapping segment assignments between workers. This caused data races when multiple workers tried to write to the same file offsets concurrently.

The fix removed the overlap by changing the segment assignment logic to ensure each segment is assigned to exactly one worker, preventing concurrent writes to the same file offsets.
